dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jay Jo. A name that barely registered on the school roster, let alone in the minds of his peers.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His world was a meticulously organized schedule of textbooks, study guides, and the relentless pursuit of perfect grades.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Another day. Another 14 hours until I can truly breathe.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLACK, RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He moved through the crowded hallways like a ghost, his eyes fixed forward, a silent barrier around him.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Yo, Jay! Jay Jo!

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Not again.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Still ignoring me, huh? You're a tough nut to crack!

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: What do you want, Minu? I have a study session.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Always studying! Come on, man, you gotta live a little!

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: The cycling club is having tryouts this week. You should totally come!

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: No.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Just "no"? Come on, I've seen you. You're fast.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: He saw me? How much?

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: I don't cycle. Not seriously.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Don't cycle? Then what was that blur I saw zipping past the park yesterday? Looked like you were flying!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: It wasn't me. You must be mistaken.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: No way! That technique, that speed... it was definitely you! You've got talent, Jay! Real talent!

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: We need a rider like you. Someone who can actually keep up. Our crew, Hummingbird, we're building something special.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: I'm not interested in joining any clubs. My focus is academics.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Academics, academics... You'll burn out, dude! A little fresh air, some adrenaline... it's good for the brain!

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Just think about it. We ride, we chill, we compete. It's a blast!

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: I said no. Please leave me alone.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: Footsteps receding

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Fine, be that way. But I'm not giving up!

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Why can't he just understand?

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: The bike... it's just a way to get around. A means to an end.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: I can't afford distractions. Not anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: The last time I got involved, the last time I let myself enjoy something... it ended badly.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: The whispers, the stares, the trouble. I swore I'd never go back to that.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: I just want to be invisible. To finish school, get into a good university, and live a quiet life.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP-THUMP

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The school day finally ended, a prison sentence commuted.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jay walked out, a heavy backpack slung over his shoulder, a familiar emptiness in his chest.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But then, a subtle shift. His eyes caught the glint of chrome.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His hands, usually stiff from holding pens, moved with a practiced ease.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Just a quick ride home. No detours. No showing off.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The wind, a gentle caress, began to whisper past his ears.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The rhythm of the pedals, a silent song only he could hear.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: This feeling...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For a fleeting moment, the weight of the world lifted. The grades, the expectations, the self-imposed isolation... they all faded.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH-WHOOSH-WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He leaned into a turn, his body a natural extension of the machine, a silent blur of motion.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Just for a moment. Just this.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Told you it was you!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SKID

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Minu! What are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Following you, obviously! You're trying to hide that talent, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Look, I know you don't want to join the club, but...

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: Just one race. One friendly race. Me against you.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: If I win, you come to tryouts. If you win, I'll never bother you about cycling again. Deal?

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: A race? He's serious.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: If I win, he'll leave me alone. It's the only way to get rid of him.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: But if I race, I'll have to... show them.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: What's it gonna be, Jay? Afraid you'll lose?

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Afraid? No. I'm afraid of what happens if I *don't* lose.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: Fine. One race.

dialogue.speaker: Minu
dialogue.line: YES! Alright! Let's do it! To the bridge and back!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: This is a mistake. A huge mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Jay
dialogue.line: But now... I have to win.

summary: Jay Jo, an academically focused student, tries to maintain his invisible facade but is relentlessly pursued by Minu Yoon, who wants him to join the cycling club. After school, Jay's secret passion for cycling is exposed, leading Minu to challenge him to a race.
